name: Cresset
description: A bright bead set in a deep ring socket, each lamp re-lighting its colour on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 86%; height: 86%; margin: 7%; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; @size: 30%; margin: -15%; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); box-shadow: 0 0 calc(40px / @Y) @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
